00039 
00040 package java.util;
00041 
00042 import jelatine.VMTimeZone;
00043 
00061 public abstract class TimeZone
00062 {
00066     private String ID;
00067 
00071     private static VMTimeZone defaultZone = null;
00072 
00085     public abstract int getOffset(int era, int year, int month, int day,
00086         int dayOfWeek, int milliseconds) throws IllegalArgumentException;
00087 
00093     public abstract int getRawOffset();
00094 
00098     public abstract boolean useDaylightTime();
00099 
00105     public String getID()
00106     {
00107         return ID;
00108     }
00109 
00116     // FIXME: XXX: JCL indicates this and other methods are synchronized.
00117     public static TimeZone getTimeZone(String ID)
00118     {
00119         // Finally, return GMT per spec
00120         return getDefault();
00121     }
00122 
00129     public static TimeZone getDefault()
00130     {
00131         if (defaultZone == null)
00132             defaultZone = new VMTimeZone(0, "GMT");
00133     
00134         return (TimeZone) defaultZone;
00135     }
00136 
00142     public static String[] getAvailableIDs()
00143     {
00144         String [] ids = new String[1];
00145 
00146         ids[0] = new String("GMT");
00147         
00148         return ids;
00149     }
00150 }
